subcodes.first_line: The horizon of utterance hath been illumined, and the Lord of all possibility proclaimeth amidst the world and calleth the peoples unto His path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد انار افق البیان و مالک الامکان ینادی بین العالم و یدع الامم الی صراطه
